title: ASelected 6Pcs 500Ml Squeeze Sauce Bottle, Squeeze Sauce Bottle With With Twist On Cap Lids, Plastic Squeeze Dispensers With Measurements For Ketchup Condiments Syrup Bbq Sauce Mustard Salad Dressing
features: SAFETY:The material is made of transparent polyethylene particles, which can safely contain sauces, and the bottle can hold 500ml of liquid, which is perfect for the kitchen birthday party

CAP DESIGN:Extrusion bottle comes with nozzle, designed a cap moisture-proof, dust-proof. Spillage and leakage can be prevented, and the bottle cap is attached to the lid and cannot be lost separately

EASY OPERATION:The condiment bottle is soft and easy to squeeze. In addition to sauces, any liquid can also be added, including paint, pigments, etc., the diameter of the bottle mouth is 5cm, which is also very convenient to add liquid
WIDELY USED:Squeeze sauce bottle can hold a variety of condiments: barbecue sauce, olive oil, tomato sauce, barbecue sauce, mayonnaise, hot sauce, soy sauce, maple syrup, salad sauce, etc
EASY CONTROL:The extrusion bottle has a scale for precise measurement and control. Small flow outlet, can control the liquid flow; The bottle is translucent color can see the use, easy to refill
description: From the manufacturer Food grade material Our condiment bottles are reusable and durable. Both in the kitchen and for everyday use Spill-Proof, Attachable Caps Our design attaches the overflow cap to the bottle cap for greater convenience and safety. This squeeze bottle prevents spills and leaks translucency All sauce bottles are naturally translucent, so your condiments can be stored safely while still giving you a clear view of what's inside Easy to use Simply place the condiments in a squeeze bottle, close the lid tightly and shake to serve without unscrewing the cap
